name: Cosmic Path
tagline: Remember the path. Trace the comet. Master the cosmic challenge.
description: Cosmic Path is a neon memory puzzle game. Watch a glowing comet trace a path across a grid, memorize it, then recreate it from memory. Progress through endless levels of increasing difficulty, compete on leaderboards, and take on a new daily challenge every day.

features.title: Endless Mode
features.description: 100+ levels with growing grids, longer paths, and faster comets

features.title: Daily Challenge
features.description: Same puzzle for everyone, every day. Build your streak.

features.title: 3 Skills
features.description: Slow time, extend the trail, or reveal the path — use them wisely

features.title: Leaderboards
features.description: Compete on Game Center and Google Play Games rankings

features.title: Fair Paths
features.description: Procedurally generated with directional balance — no cheap randomness
